title: Yet another look at narrow escape through a tube
summary: The narrow escape problem concerns the time needed for a diffusing particle to exit a confining domain through a small hole in the boundary. While this problem is now well-understood, determining the escape time for a particle that must exit through a narrow tube has proven challenging. Indeed, relying on analogies with electrodynamics, parameter fits to simulations, and heuristics, a variety of conflicting estimates for this escape time have been offered over the last three decades, some of which are counterintuitive and arguably non-physical. In this paper, we combine matched asymptotic analysis and probabilistic methods to determine the exact asymptotics of the narrow escape time through a tube. We obtain a new escape time formula which reduces to the various prior estimates in certain special cases. If the diffusivity in the tube differs from the diffusivity in the rest of the domain, our results reveal the importance of the form of the multiplicative noise inherent to any diffusivity that varies in space. We discuss our results in the context of asymmetric cell division.

AI.tldr: 本文通过匹配渐近分析和概率方法，解决了粒子通过狭窄管道逃逸时间的精确渐近问题，提出了新的逃逸时间公式，并揭示了空间变化扩散率中乘性噪声的重要性。
AI.motivation: 窄逃逸问题研究扩散粒子通过边界小孔逃逸所需时间，但粒子必须通过狭窄管道逃逸的情况一直存在挑战。过去三十年基于电动力学类比、模拟参数拟合和启发式方法提出了各种相互冲突的估计，其中一些违反直觉甚至非物理。
AI.method: 结合匹配渐近分析和概率方法，确定通过管道窄逃逸时间的精确渐近行为。
AI.result: 获得了新的逃逸时间公式，该公式在特定情况下可简化为先前的各种估计。当管道内扩散率与域内其他部分不同时，结果揭示了空间变化扩散率中乘性噪声形式的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 研究解决了长期存在的窄管道逃逸时间问题，提供了精确的渐近解，并在不对称细胞分裂的背景下讨论了结果的意义。

title: Integral formula for the propagator of the one-dimensional Hubbard model
summary: We present an exact integral formula for the multi-particle propagator of the one-dimensional Fermi--Hubbard model on an infinite lattice. The proof is based on the nested Bethe ansatz without relying on the string hypothesis. Our formula enables an explicit integral representation of the time evolution of arbitrary finite-particle wave functions and thereby provides a foundation for the exact analysis of nonequilibrium dynamics in the Hubbard model. It can further be applied to related open quantum models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一维无限格点Fermi-Hubbard模型多粒子传播子的精确积分公式，不依赖弦假设，为精确分析非平衡动力学提供基础
AI.motivation: 为精确分析Hubbard模型中的非平衡动力学提供数学基础，能够处理任意有限粒子波函数的时间演化，并可应用于相关开放量子模型
AI.method: 基于嵌套Bethe ansatz，但不依赖弦假设，推导出多粒子传播子的精确积分公式
AI.result: 获得了一维无限格点Fermi-Hubbard模型多粒子传播子的精确积分公式，能够给出任意有限粒子波函数时间演化的显式积分表示
AI.conclusion: 该精确积分公式为Hubbard模型非平衡动力学的精确分析提供了数学基础，并可推广应用于相关开放量子模型

title: A diffusion approximation for systems with frequent weak resetting
summary: We develop a diffusion approximation for systems subject to fast random resetting by small amplitudes. Equivalently, this describes systems with frequent but small catastrophes. We demonstrate the validity of the approximation by computing the stationary distribution and mean first-passage times of simple one-dimensional systems. The approximation captures dynamically induced correlations in multi-particle systems, and it can be used to generalise the conditionally independent and identically distributed structure recently found in systems with full resetting. Finally, we show that resetting can induce cycles and patterns, which can be characterised using the diffusion approximation.

AI.tldr: 提出针对快速小幅度随机重置系统的扩散近似方法，可描述频繁小规模灾难的系统
AI.motivation: 研究受快速随机重置影响的系统动力学，特别是频繁但幅度小的重置（灾难）情况，需要有效的近似方法来分析此类复杂系统
AI.method: 开发扩散近似方法，通过计算一维系统的稳态分布和平均首次通过时间来验证，并应用于多粒子系统和模式形成分析
AI.result: 近似方法有效捕获多粒子系统的动态诱导相关性，可推广完全重置系统中的条件独立同分布结构，并能描述重置诱导的循环和模式
AI.conclusion: 扩散近似为快速小幅度随机重置系统提供了有效的分析框架，能够描述复杂动态现象并推广现有理论结果

title: Plausible universality of uniaxial order in self-assembly of cross junctions in space dimension $d \ge 3$
summary: We consider the self-assembly of cross junctions in a general space dimension ($d$) as an extension of the problem studied in a previous paper for $d = 3$. This problem is equivalent to constructing a $d$-dimensional hypercubic jungle gym, at all junctions of which $2d$ rods with different colours meet. The analysis reveals a unique feature of the $d = 3$ case: the forced presence of at least one perfectly-ordered (singly coloured) direction (axis), in contrast to the possible absence of such a direction in $d \ge 4$. However, we will show that the uniaxial order is overwhelming not only in $d = 3$ but also for $d \ge 4$ in a sufficiently large system.

AI.tldr: 研究d维空间中交叉结的自组装问题，发现d=3时至少存在一个完美有序方向，而d≥4时可能没有，但在大系统中单轴有序性占主导地位。
AI.motivation: 将三维交叉结自组装问题推广到一般d维空间，研究高维情况下有序性的变化规律，特别是探索d=3与d≥4之间的本质差异。
AI.method: 将问题转化为构建d维超立方体丛林健身架，其中每个交叉点都有2d根不同颜色的杆相交，通过理论分析研究不同维度下的有序性特征。
AI.result: 发现d=3情况具有独特特征：必须至少存在一个完美有序（单色）方向（轴），而d≥4时可能完全没有这样的方向。但证明在大系统中，单轴有序性在d≥4时也占主导地位。
AI.conclusion: 三维交叉结自组装具有特殊性，强制存在完美有序方向，而高维情况虽然可能没有强制有序性，但在大尺度下单轴有序性仍然普遍存在。

title: Anisotropy reduction and tunability of hole-spin qubit g-factor in strained parabolic Ge/SiGe quantum wells
summary: Hole-spin qubits in planar Ge/SiGe heterostructures have attracted significant attention in recent years owing to their favorable electrical characteristics and prolonged coherence times. However, the strong spin-orbit interaction also makes them susceptible to charge noise and inhomogeneous strain. This is further exacerbated by the highly anisotropic g-factor of the planar design. Although there are some known strategies to suppress charge noise, one approach is to engineer an isotropic g-factor. In this work we analyze how qubit confinement profile affects the g-factor of hole-spin qubits. We show that decreasing the characteristic in-plane qubit confinement length reduces the g-factor anisotropy. We perform analytical and numerical analysis to compare two types of quantum wells: square wells and parabolic wells. We show that square wells have limited tunability, while parabolic wells offer broader tunability, making them more promising for qubit engineering.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了空穴自旋量子比特的约束轮廓对其g因子各向异性的影响，发现减小面内约束长度可降低g因子各向异性，抛物线型量子阱比方形量子阱具有更好的可调性。
AI.motivation: 平面Ge/SiGe异质结构中的空穴自旋量子比特虽然具有优良的电学特性和较长的相干时间，但强自旋轨道耦合使其易受电荷噪声和非均匀应变影响，而平面设计的高度各向异性g因子加剧了这一问题。需要寻找降低g因子各向异性的方法。
AI.method: 通过解析和数值分析，研究量子比特约束轮廓对g因子的影响，比较两种量子阱类型：方形阱和抛物线型阱，分析特征面内约束长度对g因子各向异性的影响。
AI.result: 减小特征面内量子比特约束长度可降低g因子各向异性；方形阱的可调性有限，而抛物线型阱提供更宽的可调性范围，更适合量子比特工程应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化量子比特约束轮廓，特别是使用抛物线型量子阱并减小面内约束长度，可以有效降低空穴自旋量子比特的g因子各向异性，从而提高其对电荷噪声和非均匀应变的鲁棒性。

title: Using Neural Networks to Accelerate TALYS-2.0 Nuclear Reaction Simulations
summary: Recent efforts to improve the predictability of TALYS-2.0 calculated charged-particle residual product cross sections have focused on adjusting parameters related to the optical model potential and pre-equilibrium process. Although adjusted TALYS-2.0 outputs show marked improvements in agreement with experimental data over the default parameters, the procedure is generally time-consuming due to the need for sequential TALYS-2.0 calculations. Since the models and model parameters must be defined and constrained prior to adjustment, we show in this work that an artificial neural network can serve as a surrogate model to successfully predict TALYS-2.0 outputs within this domain of input parameters. No practical differences were observed in the trained model's performance between uniform random, Latin hypercube and Sobol sequence sampling for generating the training datasets. Once validated, trained neural network models were used to adjust TALYS-2.0 nuclear model parameters, where a multi-parameter fitting procedure was not only feasible but optimal for this process. The neural network approach is >1000x faster at generating residual product cross sections than using TALYS-2.0 directly, and a high-fidelity surrogate model could be implemented with about 1500 TALYS-2.0 files to achieve adjusted cross sections comparable to the previous publication.

AI.tldr: 使用人工神经网络作为TALYS-2.0核反应计算代码的代理模型，显著加速带电粒子剩余产物截面预测和参数调整过程
AI.motivation: 传统调整TALYS-2.0参数（光学模型势和预平衡过程）来改进截面预测的方法耗时且需要顺序计算，需要更高效的替代方案
AI.method: 训练人工神经网络作为TALYS-2.0的代理模型，比较均匀随机、拉丁超立方和Sobol序列采样方法，使用训练好的神经网络进行多参数拟合调整
AI.result: 神经网络方法比直接使用TALYS-2.0快1000倍以上，仅需约1500个TALYS-2.0计算文件即可实现与先前发表结果相当的调整截面
AI.conclusion: 神经网络作为TALYS-2.0的代理模型是可行且高效的，能够显著加速核反应参数调整过程，为核数据计算提供实用工具

title: Ab Initio Random Matrix Theory of Molecular Electronic Structure
summary: We use ab initio electronic-structure methods to investigate random-matrix theory (RMT) universality in molecular electronic structure. Using single-reference electronic structure methods, including Hartree-Fock, configuration-interaction singles (CIS), density functional theory, and linear-response time-dependent density-functional theory, we compute single-particle orbital energies and many-electron excitations of several representative molecules (benzene, alanine, 1-phenylethylamine, methyloxirane, and helicene chains). For generic low-symmetry geometries, the unfolded spectra of these ab initio Hamiltonians exhibit Wigner-Dyson level statistics of the Gaussian orthogonal ensemble (GOE). For extended helicene chains we explicitly restrict to bound valence excitations below the ionization threshold and still observe GOE statistics, indicating that the RMT universality is present for physical states of direct relevance to real molecules. We further explore the electric and magnetic field dependence of the molecular electronic spectra. The variance of electric polarizability (level curvature K) is predicted to be non-analytic in the magnetic field which serves as an infrared cutoff, <K^2> proportional to log(1/|B|). We observe a transition to the Gaussian unitary ensemble (GUE) by increasing the magnetic fields, although it occurs only at magnetic fields far beyond experimentally accessible scales. Our results indicate that random matrix universality provides a general framework for organizing ab initio predictions of interacting electron spectra in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 使用从头算电子结构方法研究分子电子结构中的随机矩阵理论普适性，发现低对称性分子谱呈现GOE统计，强磁场下可观测到GUE转变
AI.motivation: 探索随机矩阵理论在复杂分子电子结构中的普适性，验证RMT是否能为实际分子系统的电子谱提供一般性理论框架
AI.method: 采用从头算电子结构方法（HF、CIS、DFT、TDDFT），计算代表性分子（苯、丙氨酸、苯乙胺、甲基环氧乙烷、螺旋烯链）的单粒子轨道能量和多电子激发谱，分析能级统计特性
AI.result: 低对称性分子几何构型下，展开谱呈现高斯正交系综的Wigner-Dyson统计；螺旋烯链的束缚价激发态也显示GOE统计；电场极化率方差在磁场中呈现非解析行为；强磁场下观测到GUE转变
AI.conclusion: 随机矩阵理论普适性为复杂系统中相互作用电子谱的从头算预测提供了通用理论框架

title: Non adiabatic dynamics of the ferroelectric soft mode
summary: Most microscopic descriptions of structural dynamics assume the Born-Oppenheimer separation, where electrons adjust adiabatically to ionic motion. When this separation breaks down, electronic and lattice degrees of freedom can evolve on different timescales, giving rise to new physical phenomena beyond the adiabatic limit. Here we use time-resolved, phase-sensitive second-harmonic generation and pump-probe reflectivity to reshape the ferroelectric free-energy landscape of SnTe while separately tracking polar order and coherent lattice motion. When photoexcitation transiently suppresses the double-well barrier, polarization dynamics become strongly nonlinear, while the coherent phonon dynamics remain harmonic. This decoupling cannot be described by a single adiabatic coordinate for the electronic polarization and ionic positions. We provide a unifying physical description for the non adiabatic dynamics of the ferroelectric mode and the mixed displacive/order-disorder nature of SnTe based on a separation of scales for the renormalization of the ferroelectric stiffness.

AI.tldr: 通过时间分辨相位敏感二次谐波产生和泵浦-探测反射率技术，在SnTe中重塑铁电自由能景观，发现极化动力学与相干声子动力学解耦，揭示了铁电模式非绝热动力学的新物理现象
AI.motivation: 传统微观结构动力学描述基于玻恩-奥本海默近似，当这一近似失效时，电子和晶格自由度在不同时间尺度演化，会产生超越绝热极限的新物理现象。研究旨在探索铁电材料中电子-晶格耦合的非绝热动力学
AI.method: 使用时间分辨、相位敏感的第二谐波产生和泵浦-探测反射率技术，在光激发下重塑SnTe的铁电自由能景观，同时分别追踪极化序和相干晶格运动
AI.result: 当光激发瞬时抑制双势垒时，极化动力学变得高度非线性，而相干声子动力学保持谐波特性。这种解耦现象无法用电子极化和离子位置的单一绝热坐标描述，揭示了铁电刚度的重整化存在尺度分离
AI.conclusion: 基于铁电刚度重整化的尺度分离，为SnTe的铁电模式非绝热动力学及其混合位移/有序-无序性质提供了统一的物理描述，揭示了超越传统绝热近似的电子-晶格耦合新机制

title: The Effect of Base-Pairing on the Shape Resonances of Nucleobases
summary: In this work, we have studied the effect of base-pairing on the shape resonances of guanine and cytosine nucleobases. Among the seven π* resonances we identified in the guanine-cytosine (GC) anion radical, three were centered on cytosine, and the remaining were guanine-centered. Relative to the isolated bases, upon base pair formation, the cytosine resonances were red shifted, while the guanine-centered states showed an opposite trend - where their energy was blue shifted. In addition to the electronic interactions, geometric distortion and basis set superposition error plays a crucial role in the resonance positions and widths of the GC radical anion. The electronic interaction from the complementary base seems to have a larger effect on the stabilization of the anionic resonances than the surrounding environment.

AI.tldr: 研究鸟嘌呤-胞嘧啶碱基对形成对π*共振态的影响，发现胞嘧啶共振红移而鸟嘌呤共振蓝移，电子相互作用比环境因素对阴离子共振稳定更重要
AI.motivation: 研究碱基配对如何影响鸟嘌呤和胞嘧啶核碱基的形状共振，特别是对阴离子自由基中π*共振态的影响，理解电子相互作用、几何畸变和基组重叠误差在共振位置和宽度中的作用
AI.method: 通过理论计算研究鸟嘌呤-胞嘧啶（GC）碱基对阴离子自由基中的π*共振态，分析七个共振态（三个胞嘧啶中心，四个鸟嘌呤中心），比较孤立碱基与碱基对形成后的共振能量变化
AI.result: 在GC阴离子自由基中识别出七个π*共振态，胞嘧啶中心的共振相对于孤立碱基红移，而鸟嘌呤中心的共振蓝移；几何畸变和基组重叠误差对共振位置和宽度起关键作用；互补碱基的电子相互作用对阴离子共振稳定的影响大于周围环境
AI.conclusion: 碱基配对显著影响核碱基的形状共振，胞嘧啶和鸟嘌呤表现出相反的共振能量变化趋势；电子相互作用在稳定阴离子共振方面比环境因素更为重要，这对理解DNA/RNA中电子转移和辐射损伤机制具有重要意义

title: Granular aluminum induced superconductivity in germanium for hole spin-based hybrid devices
summary: In superconductor-semiconductor hybrid structures, superconductivity and spin polarization are competing effects because magnetic fields break Cooper pairs. They can be combined using thin films and in-plane magnetic fields, an approach that enabled the pursuit of Majorana zero modes, Kitaev chains, and Andreev spin qubits (ASQs), but remains challenging for materials with small in-plane g-factors. Here we show that granular aluminum (grAl), composed of nanometer-scale aluminum grains embedded in an amorphous oxide matrix, can overcome this limitation. By depositing grAl on Ge/SiGe heterostructures, we induce a hard superconducting gap with BCS peaks at 305 $μ$eV and magnetic-field resilience for both the in-plane and out-of-plane directions, allowing Zeeman splitting of Yu-Shiba-Rusinov (YSR) states beyond 50 $μ$eV (12 GHz). Leveraging this robustness, we reveal signatures of hole physics and demonstrate g-tensor tunability.

AI.tldr: 在超导-半导体混合结构中，通过使用纳米颗粒铝（grAl）材料克服了传统方法对平面内高g因子材料的依赖，实现了在任意磁场方向下的强超导性和自旋极化共存，为量子计算应用提供了新材料平台。
AI.motivation: 传统超导-半导体混合结构中，超导性和自旋极化是相互竞争的效果，因为磁场会破坏库珀对。虽然可以通过薄膜和面内磁场的方法结合两者，但这种方法对具有小面内g因子的材料仍然具有挑战性。需要寻找能够克服这一限制的新材料系统。
AI.method: 采用纳米颗粒铝（grAl）材料，由嵌入非晶氧化物基质中的纳米级铝颗粒组成。将grAl沉积在Ge/SiGe异质结构上，诱导产生硬超导能隙（BCS峰值为305 μeV），并测试其在面内和面外磁场方向下的磁弹性。利用这种鲁棒性研究YSR态的塞曼分裂、空穴物理特征和g张量可调性。
AI.result: grAl在Ge/SiGe上实现了硬超导能隙，在任意磁场方向下都表现出磁弹性。YSR态的塞曼分裂超过50 μeV（12 GHz），展示了强大的磁场鲁棒性。同时揭示了空穴物理特征并证明了g张量的可调性。
AI.conclusion: 纳米颗粒铝（grAl）材料成功克服了传统超导-半导体混合结构对小面内g因子材料的限制，实现了在任意磁场方向下的超导性和自旋极化共存，为马约拉纳零模、Kitaev链和安德烈夫自旋量子比特等量子计算应用提供了有前景的新材料平台。

title: Combining matrix product states and mean-field theory to capture magnetic order in quasi-1D cuprates
summary: We study quasi-one-dimensional strongly correlated materials using a multi-step approach based on density functional theory, downfolding techniques, and tensor-network simulations. The downfolding procedure yields effective multiband Hubbard models that capture the competition between electron hopping and local Coulomb interactions relevant to the system's low-energy properties. The resulting multiband Hubbard models are solved using matrix product states. Applied to Sr$_2$CuO$_3$, SrBaCuO$_3$, and Ba$_2$CuO$_3$, this purely one-dimensional treatment yields no long-range magnetic order, in contrast to the magnetic ordering observed experimentally. To account for this behavior, we extend the multi-step approach by incorporating interchain couplings through a self-consistent mean-field scheme. This combined approach stabilizes finite staggered magnetizations, providing a consistent description of magnetic order in agreement with experiment. For Sr$_2$CuO$_{3.5}$ and SrCuO$_2$, we also tested an approach proposed for ladder materials, however, we find that these materials are not well suited for this approach due to the small magnitude of the intraladder hopping parameters.

AI.tldr: 该研究采用多步骤方法研究准一维强关联材料，结合密度泛函理论、降维技术和张量网络模拟，通过引入链间耦合解释了实验观测到的磁有序现象。
AI.motivation: 研究准一维强关联材料中的磁有序现象，解释为什么纯粹一维处理无法重现实验观测到的长程磁有序，需要引入链间耦合机制。
AI.method: 采用三步法：1) 密度泛函理论计算；2) 降维技术得到有效的多带Hubbard模型；3) 矩阵乘积态张量网络模拟。为解释磁有序，进一步引入自洽平均场方法处理链间耦合。
AI.result: 纯粹一维处理对Sr₂CuO₃、SrBaCuO₃和Ba₂CuO₃不产生长程磁有序，与实验矛盾。引入链间耦合后，自洽平均场方法稳定了交错磁化强度，与实验一致。对于Sr₂CuO₃.₅和SrCuO₂，发现其不适合梯子材料方法。
AI.conclusion: 准一维强关联材料的磁有序需要链间耦合的考虑，纯粹一维处理不足以描述实验现象。自洽平均场方法能有效解释磁有序，为类似材料研究提供了有效框架。
